briefing_items.title: Replit Introduces Agent 4
briefing_items.summary: Replit has introduced Agent 4, which features an infinite design canvas, the ability to build multiple projects in one place, parallel agents, and automated execution of tasks.

briefing_items.title: Groq API Key Availability
briefing_items.summary: Groq has made its API key available, allowing users to access top models, extensive tool calling, and built-in support for features like prompt caching and batch processing.

briefing_items.title: Google Account Security Alerts
briefing_items.summary: Google has sent out security alerts for various account activities, including new sign-ins, recovery email changes, 2-Step Verification enablement, and app password creation.

briefing_items.title: Google Account Access Restoration
briefing_items.summary: Google has received a request to restore access to a Google Account and will review it as soon as possible.
